interpretation: Production public Work list still returns period/iconUrl, while origin/main WorkCardDto does not define those fields.
Production public Work detail still returns contentJson/iconUrl and video originalFileName/fileSize/createdAt, while origin/main uses public Content and trimmed PublicWorkVideoDto.

Production responses expose X-App-Elapsed-Ms but not X-Nginx-Request-Time through the Cloudflare/public probe, so server-side preflight must be run on the host to verify local nginx headers after deploy.
Real Backend Test should not be interpreted until server pull/up and preflight pass.
nextRequiredInput: Provide direct SSH host/IP for srv1592512 or run the serverCommands above and paste the outputs/artifacts.

recheck.decision: keep_blocked; do not rerun Real Backend Test until production containers are recreated from latest main runtime image

likelyRootCause: Production .env.prod may still point to legacy GHCR images without the -runtime- suffix. Local /mnt/d/woong-blog/service/.env.prod shows FRONTEND_IMAGE=ghcr.io/kimwoonggon/woong-blog-aspcore-nextjs-frontend:main and BACKEND_IMAGE=ghcr.io/kimwoonggon/woong-blog-aspcore-nextjs-backend:main, while Publish GHCR Main pushes ghcr.io/kimwoonggon/woong-blog-aspcore-nextjs-runtime-frontend:main and ...-runtime-backend:main.

ghcrPackageEvidence.checkedWith: gh api /users/kimwoonggon/packages?package_type=container and package versions endpoints
ghcrPackageEvidence.conclusion: legacy package main tags are from 2026-04-15 and do not contain the current origin/main merge 1bf8a5dc9d57; runtime package main tags do.

loadScriptBehavior: requires git, docker, curl, node, and k6 on the server
auto-resolves STUDY_READ_PATH from /api/public/blogs?page=1&pageSize=12, excluding seed/fixture slugs and titles
runs prod-real-load-steps.sh with LIST_PAGE_SIZE fixed by that script at 12

missingRequirements: server-side latest main runtime pull/deploy evidence
valid latest-runtime Real Backend Test output
full e2e pass after selected slice
CI/publish/main promotion pass after selected slice

candidates.requiredUserAction: Verify the new host fingerprint out-of-band before removing/updating known_hosts or allowing connection.

candidates.note: Windows my_vm_key.pem was tested through a temporary chmod 600 copy; all tried users denied publickey/password in BatchMode.
Windows SSH config ProxyCommand references C:\cloudflared-windows-amd64.exe, which is unavailable from WSL as /mnt/c/cloudflared-windows-amd64.exe.

cloudflaredDockerAttempt.interpretation: trycloudflare tunnel alias appears expired/unavailable, so this is not a usable production SSH route right now.

confirmedProductionHost.authStatus: denied for root/ubuntu/deploy with available Windows key and no ssh-agent
confirmedProductionHost.nextRequiredInput: Provide root password, correct SSH key, or run pasteable-server-commands.md directly on srv1592512.hstgr.cloud.

validations: Extracted both bash blocks from pasteable-server-commands.md and verified them with bash -n without executing server commands.
Hardened public stale-key recheck to use curl --compressed, then revalidated server-main-runtime-redeploy.sh and both pasteable bash blocks with bash -n.

finalPublicRecheck.decision: still blocked before valid Real Backend Test
